---
title: "Jihee Yoon"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:jiy156@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jihee-chloe-yoon/
---

Hi 👋🏻 I'm a data analyst specializing in building data pipelines and developing business solutions. I have worked for top-tier tech companies and I am passionate about working with organizations that want to make effective use of their data 👩🏻‍💻
